_comment: App Insights workbook template for Optio agent job monitoring. Placeholder __APP_INSIGHTS_ID__ is substituted by deploy-monitoring.sh at deploy time.

content.json:
## Optio Agent Job — Task Execution Monitoring

This workbook shows task execution counts (succeeded vs. failed) and estimated compute cost for `optio-agent-job` running on Azure Container Apps.

content.query:
ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s == 'optio-agent-job' or ContainerGroupName_s contains 'optio-agent-job'
| extend EventType = case(
    Reason_s == 'Succeeded' or Log_s contains 'Succeeded', 'Succeeded',
    Reason_s == 'Failed' or Log_s contains 'Failed' or Log_s contains 'Error', 'Failed',
    'Other'
  )
| where EventType in ('Succeeded', 'Failed')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), EventType
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Panel 1: Task Execution Count Over Time (Succeeded vs Failed)

content.query:
ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s == 'optio-agent-job' or ContainerGroupName_s contains 'optio-agent-job'
| where Reason_s == 'Succeeded' or Log_s contains 'Succeeded'
| extend
    CPUSeconds = todouble(coalesce(column_ifexists('CpuUsage_d', real(null)), 0.5)) * 60.0,
    AcaConsumptionRatePerCPUSecond = 0.000024
| extend EstimatedCostUSD = CPUSeconds * AcaConsumptionRatePerCPUSecond
| summarize
    TotalTasks = count(),
    AvgCPUSeconds = avg(CPUSeconds),
    EstCostPerTask = avg(EstimatedCostUSD),
    TotalEstCost = sum(EstimatedCostUSD)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| project TimeGenerated, TotalTasks, AvgCPUSeconds, EstCostPerTask, TotalEstCost
content.title: Panel 2: Estimated Cost Per Task (CPU-seconds × ACA Consumption Rate)
